testcase.name: getContactLogDetail2

failure.message: expected [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2027-02-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2027-03-01T12:15:14","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009048","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2027-02-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2027-03-01T12:15:14","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009026","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2027-02-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2027-03-01T12:15:14","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009048","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2027-02-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2027-03-01T12:15:14","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009026","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}]
